itemListElement.reviewBody: Worst school and worst management. They simply tortured my baby. Never ever go for this. Ridiculous people. How could they do this with small babies? We are thinking of filing police complaint against them.

Dear Euro kids team ,
Thank you for creating such a warm and nurturing environment for our children. We truly appreciate your patience, kindness, and dedication. I have seen many positive improvements in my child and you all play a vital role in the growth and development.  Special mentions for my child's favorite Aarti teacher and Raksha teacher.  Thank You !

Hello, our experience with Eurokids preschool was amazing!! It is one of the best preschool in Baner.
The last 3 years with Eurokids were very productive and superb learning experience for my daughter. The teachers and staff is very supportive and co-operative.
The curriculum is so nicely set which really helps in overall child's development.

I would highly recommend Eurokids baner preschool..!!
Very good school considering small children also very nice day care facilities with very kind and helpful staff including teachers and mavashis

To,
All Euro Kids Team....

I want to extend my heartfelt gratitude to each one of you for providing such a nurturing and wonderful learning environment for my child. The care, love, and dedication you show every day have had an incredible impact on their growth and development. I truly appreciate the effort you put into making learning fun, engaging, and meaningful.

Thank you for being a positive influence in their early education journey. We are so grateful for everything you do sir..🙏🏻🙏🏻🙏🏻🙏🏻Thank u soo soo much 🙏🏻
Euro Kids is the best Pri School.... 🌟🌟🌟🌟🌟🌟🌟

I would like to express my sincere gratitude for the wonderful care and support that Euro Kids has provided for my daughter since she started in Nursery. She has grown and developed so much under your guidance, and I have seen her confidence and social skills blossom.
As she transitions from Nursery to Senior KG, I am very happy to note how well she is being handled and settled in her new environment. The teachers and staff have been incredibly supportive, always attentive to her individual needs. She enjoys the classroom activities, and I can see how much effort the staff puts into creating a nurturing and encouraging atmosphere.
The way Euro Kids fosters a sense of belonging and helps children feel safe and secure is truly commendable. My daughter has always looked forward to school, and I attribute this to the positive experience she’s had with you all. The balance between education, creativity, and play has allowed her to grow both academically and emotionally.
I am grateful to have her in such a wonderful school, and I appreciate the dedication and love that each teacher and staff member gives to her and all the children. Keep up the fantastic work!
Thank you for everything!

Dear Teachers,

As we reflect on the incredible experience of this year’s Annual Day, we are overwhelmed with gratitude for everything you’ve done for our little ones. Watching them perform with such joy, confidence, and spirit left us emotional beyond words. It’s hard to express just how deeply appreciative we are for the hard work, dedication, and love you poured into helping them prepare for this special day.

We know teaching preschool children—especially when it comes to teaching dance, coordination, and teamwork—is no easy task. But you made it seem effortless. You have brought out the very best in our children, showing us parts of them we never even knew existed. From their enthusiasm to their growing self-belief, it’s clear that the effort you put into each lesson made all the difference.

To see our children shine on stage, participating with such heart and energy, was nothing short of magical. It left us with tears of happiness and pride, and we couldn’t have asked for better mentors for our little ones. You’ve given them not just the skills to perform, but the confidence to stand tall, work together, and celebrate their achievements.

Thank you for your tireless work, your patience, and your passion. You’ve made this Annual Day unforgettable, and we are so grateful to have had you guide our children on this journey.

With heartfelt appreciation and endless gratitude,

Parents of Abir and Kabir
Jr kg

A Wonderful Preschool Experience!

I am so grateful for the amazing experience my child is having at Euro School Baner. From day one, the staff has been warm, welcoming, and truly dedicated to providing a nurturing environment for the kids. My child has flourished here, not only academically but socially as well.

The curriculum is both engaging and age-appropriate, allowing my little one to explore new concepts in a fun and hands-on way. I’ve noticed incredible growth in their communication skills, creativity, and even confidence since joining. The teachers are kind, patient, and genuinely care about each child’s individual needs and learning style.

I also appreciate how involved the school keeps parents. Regular updates, progress reports, and open communication make me feel connected and reassured that my child is in excellent hands. It’s clear that Euroschool baner goes above and beyond to create a safe, supportive, and exciting learning environment for all children. Even if child missed the school for some reason they try to cover their homework during school hours only. They do have tie ups with the good schools where owner Sachin Sir himself helped me to connect to respective school for grade 1 admission. The owner and teacher both have detail involvement in day today activities which we can see very rarely.

I couldn’t be happier with our experience and highly recommend this preschool to any parent looking for a place where their child will thrive!

A very good experience at Eurokids, Baner. My kid is very happy and groomed better day to day. Each day there is new learning with bundle of knowledge and joy. Also each and every event is very beautifully organised by teachers very great efforts alongwith participation of all the kidoss..
Specia thanks to teachers for organising Sports day with full energy and spark....
Very good staff.. Teachers are humble and caring. All activities are properly executed. Very well managed events like sports day annual day etc. Meenal mam and Sachin sir are very supportive.
